mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_permission ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT p.* FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.pk_permission = rp.perm_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.sort_order

SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.pk_permission = rp.perm_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission (perm_name, perm_code, parent_id, url, type, icon, sort_order) VALUES (#{permName}, #{permCode}, #{parentId}, #{url}, #{type}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder})
